race.comment: PRINCE OF SYNERGY (5) disappointed last time but his Gatton form the two prior reads well. Comes back 200m and should enjoy a soft run. Rates the one they have to beat. ELLES MY NAME (9) is locally trained and resumes today. Showed enough in her brief initial preparation to consider and she draws inside and will be naturally improved. Presents off a trial near miss here in the inner track. The betting will be key. Ditto with FRED'S MEMORY (3), who resumes from a spell of a year and was close to a win before the break. May need one but is good enough to consider and has upside. SILENT FOX (6) is a Victorian who has switched to the Currie yard. Expect him to be much more competitive than the form line suggests and he owns a Gatton trial win.
